# init(strideInX:strideInY:strideInZ:dilationRateInX:dilationRateInY:dilationRateInZ:groups:paddingStyle:dataLayout:weightsLayout:)

**Initializer**

Creates a convolution descriptor with given values for parameters.

## Declaration

```swift
convenience init?(strideInX: Int, strideInY: Int, strideInZ: Int, dilationRateInX: Int, dilationRateInY: Int, dilationRateInZ: Int, groups: Int, paddingStyle: MPSGraphPaddingStyle, dataLayout: MPSGraphTensorNamedDataLayout, weightsLayout: MPSGraphTensorNamedDataLayout)
```

## Parameters

- **strideInX**: See [doc://com.apple.metalperformanceshadersgraph/documentation/MetalPerformanceShadersGraph/MPSGraphConvolution3DOpDescriptor/strideInX] property.
- **strideInY**: See [doc://com.apple.metalperformanceshadersgraph/documentation/MetalPerformanceShadersGraph/MPSGraphConvolution3DOpDescriptor/strideInY] property.
- **strideInZ**: See [doc://com.apple.metalperformanceshadersgraph/documentation/MetalPerformanceShadersGraph/MPSGraphConvolution3DOpDescriptor/strideInZ] property.
- **dilationRateInX**: See [doc://com.apple.metalperformanceshadersgraph/documentation/MetalPerformanceShadersGraph/MPSGraphConvolution3DOpDescriptor/dilationRateInX] property.
- **dilationRateInY**: See [doc://com.apple.metalperformanceshadersgraph/documentation/MetalPerformanceShadersGraph/MPSGraphConvolution3DOpDescriptor/dilationRateInY] property.
- **dilationRateInZ**: See [doc://com.apple.metalperformanceshadersgraph/documentation/MetalPerformanceShadersGraph/MPSGraphConvolution3DOpDescriptor/dilationRateInZ] property.
- **groups**: See [doc://com.apple.metalperformanceshadersgraph/documentation/MetalPerformanceShadersGraph/MPSGraphConvolution3DOpDescriptor/groups] property.
- **paddingStyle**: See [doc://com.apple.metalperformanceshadersgraph/documentation/MetalPerformanceShadersGraph/MPSGraphConvolution3DOpDescriptor/paddingStyle] property.
- **dataLayout**: See [doc://com.apple.metalperformanceshadersgraph/documentation/MetalPerformanceShadersGraph/MPSGraphConvolution3DOpDescriptor/dataLayout] property.
- **weightsLayout**: See [doc://com.apple.metalperformanceshadersgraph/documentation/MetalPerformanceShadersGraph/MPSGraphConvolution3DOpDescriptor/weightsLayout] property.

## Return Value

The `MPSGraphConvolution3DOpDescriptor` on autoreleasepool.
